title: Add remarks field to entries with rich mouseover tooltip
description: Currently the mouseover bubble only shows the entry label. Add an optional 'remarks' field to entries (e.g. architectural rationale for why something is in hold/assess/etc). Display this in the tooltip on mouseover. Keep it generic as a free-text remarks field for flexibility.

title: Support arbitrary number of rings
description: Currently rings are hardcoded to 4 (adopt/trial/assess/hold). Following the same pattern as the arbitrary segments work, allow config.rings to drive the number of rings dynamically. Ring radii should either be computed evenly or remain user-configurable.
